interactions.stageContent: {"sections":[{"sectionName":"Cloud Infrastructure","purpose":"Present end-to-end cloud migration capabilities and hybrid cloud management","selectedSlideId":"slide-cloud-001","rationale":"Meridian's on-premise infrastructure needs a clear migration and modernization path — this slide anchors the cloud story"},{"sectionName":"Data Analytics","purpose":"Present modern data stack capabilities: lakehouse, streaming, and batch processing","selectedSlideId":"slide-data-001","rationale":"Meridian's fragmented data landscape requires a unified platform narrative to show consolidation value"},{"sectionName":"Security","purpose":"Present comprehensive security posture management and identity-based access control","selectedSlideId":"slide-sec-001","rationale":"Security is a top board-level concern for Meridian — leading with Zero Trust shows strategic alignment"},{"sectionName":"Summary & Engagement","purpose":"Show how all three capability areas work together and propose next steps","selectedSlideId":"slide-summary-001","rationale":"Ties the three domains into a single transformation story with a clear call to action"}]}
